title: Did Rei become Lilith like in EoE
display_title: Did Rei become Lilith like in EoE
wikitext:
[]: Did Rei become Lilith like in EoE?             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Jun 30, 2013 11:03 pm I read the Third Impact article, but still, I don't really get what happened. Whe CAN'T know what happened, but I would like to know if this is a possibility: What if Rei from 1.0 and 2.0 united with Lilith again like in EoE? We know that there is a relation between the two in the Rebuild, like in the series, so if Lilith grew a Rei head (it is specified in the script that it is Rei's head!) that could mean that Third Impact was not just caused because the 12th Angel attacked. Maybe Gendo was responsible for Third Impact, thanks to Shinji's Near Third Impact (in some way). Wille just knew that Rei wasn't in the entry plug. But Gendo could have salvaged her without Wille knowing, after all she is (probably) Lilith, and they need her! What if Fuyutsuki lied to Shinji? What if he told him the truth but didn't tell him that Ayanami is actually Lilith. And that would also mean that she's dead. Kaworu doesn't say that Lilith is a body without a soul, he says she is a corpse, dead. I think Gendo convinced Rei to return to Lilith, manipulated her (it's easy). If you think about it, it would be like Gendo from EoE succeeding. Only that this time the plan seems longer than in NGE. And Adam? Was he involved in the Third Impact (one of the four)? Maybe it was Eva-13? This is just speculation, we don't know if the rules are the same as in NGE, but the Rei-Lilith is very suspicious. The only thing she lacks is the wings, but that could be because Mark.06 stopped her. Could it be that Gendo imprisoned the 12th Angel on purpose, without that Angel being the trigger of the Impact? And why doesn't Wille just attack Nerv? Is it a plothole? Because that could explain many things. Sorry if this is confusing and badly written, I must go to sleep...

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Mon Jul 01, 2013 5:46 am It is extremely likely that a Rei reunited with Lilith, as shown by Lilith's severed head, however we have no way of knowing whether this is the same Rei from 1.0 and 2.0 because Fuyu says she's in Eva-01. I don't think Eva-13 was involved at that point, though, as we see it being created in 3.0 and it seems it had only just been completed when Shinji arrives at Nerv. As for why Wille doesn't just attack Nerv, it's probably because of the "L Barrier" Asuka mentions at the end of the movie.

[]: Interim Reis             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Jul 01, 2013 6:02 am Ah, so I'm not the only one who guessed that! There are indications that something similar to EoE went down (bakelite & tanks in NERV HQ, it appears to have been heavily bombarded... etc. ) but went horribly wrong without Shinji present, like a whole bunch of other things. Perhaps the 12th angel infected one of the missing EVAs with a Rei inside, or perhaps the 12th angel just reached Lillith, and we got an interrupted version "oyasumi" ending from EVA 2 (Angels merges with Lillith, Rei follows, "Goodnight everyone....") Basically, there's lots of grounds for various speculation. Either way, we have indications that there were plenty of interim Reis on one hand, and a very Rei-like Lillith head on the other. perhaps there WAS a Rebuild!ReiIII. Perhaps the vest-sporting one from the trailer, who appeared to have ReiIII's characteristic narrower/half-open eyes, and she ended up merging with Lillith, but the result was wildly different for lack of Shinji. Her doing something Gendo didn't want would also explain why nothing came of his claim of "soon, very soon..." - the trailer!vest still appears outside ReiQs room, (with other random items from her appartment, like empty pill wrappings, and even one of these brown medicine glass tubes, such as seen in her old room in ep 23) even though it doesn't seem like ReiQ herself ever wore clothes other than her plugsuit. There is also the name tag from outside her appartment - it seems like a very Rei thing for her to go and take it back with her to label her new room, but again, that was most likely some clone *before* ReiQ. There's this whole symbolism of Shinji never getting inside that room and thus, ReiQ's own, empty little world; He piles up the books before the nametag like it's an altar, just like he was kinda fooled by her familiar exterior, but a total stranger to the person inside that familiar-looking blue-haired head. Either way, from WILLE's reaction to the Mk Nine and their claim that their goal is "to destroy all of NERVs EVAs" it's quite possible that some of them suffered death by WILLE, but I doubt Gendo would get to bring back/label (they have paper tags on them) their heads that way... Or maybe bringing back the head is necessary to transfer the soul fragment? Or maybe those which Fuyu has there are just those that died in the HQ, because they don't live that long without Ritsuko to do maintenance on them? In any case, ReiQ still has pills in her room. One thing about all this is that is properly drives home the horror factor of a programmable, replaceable artificial soldier. Because, while similar implications were there in classic!NGE, the particular clones we saw were the original, Shinji's special chosen Aimée, /the most human one, and the one clone who finally gave her creator the finger/the whole trapped godess aspect. If Rei I is nature, Rei III was choice, and Rei II was connections with people, Rei Q has the emphasis on the lab upbringing, she has little more than the very essential programming, she's kept there, naked, in that not-room, waiting for orders... And they killed/cloned her over and over again . because wether one of them merged with Lillith or not (and one most likely did), there certainly WERE interim Reis. LOTs of those. Swallow that...

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Mon Jul 01, 2013 6:11 am Nice analysis, Kendrix! Perhaps the Quantum!Reis seen in 1.0 and Q may also stem from Lilith and Rei reuniting at some point in the timeskip, rather than from an event in the future (although we'd have to see Final to confirm that). Possibly Quantum!Rei's appearance to ReiQ may be intended as a sort of metaphorical "passing the torch", from one Rei to another.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Jul 01, 2013 6:28 am I looked back in Q with the scene where Rei was in the tank and suddenly sees, um, schoolgirl Rei (maybe Rei II from 2.0) just to see if Rei Q had the collar with her "rank" or whatever printed on it. (I just assumed Rei Q was Rei III, but the movie doesn't tell us one way or another on this one. I also assumed that Rei's collar had some purpose beyond visual identification.) I found it interesting that, unlike Rei from 2.0, Rei Q doesn't even need to wear a collar to do... whatever it was she needed to do in the tank. (I don't think that's ever been explained in this universe either.) So, whereas this does leave open the question of which Rei is featured in Q, this also makes me wonder what the collar was used for in 2.0. (Besides the obvious visual identification.) Did it assist her in doing... whatever it was she needed to do in the tank?

[]: Further analysis on Quantum magic/interim Reis             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Jul 01, 2013 6:32 am Shinoyami65 wrote: Nice analysis, Kendrix! Perhaps the Quantum!Reis seen in 1.0 and Q may also stem from Lilith and Rei reuniting at some point in the timeskip, rather than from an event in the future (although we'd have to see Final to confirm that). Possibly Quantum!Rei's appearance to ReiQ may be intended as a sort of metaphorical "passing the torch", from one Rei to another.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Mon Jul 01, 2013 6:35 am Well ReiQ clearly doesn't need the collar. Possibly a combination of the harsh conditions of the post-3I world and the many dead interim Reis made producing a collar for each new Rei impractical. From a real-world point of view, it may be to deliberately keep ReiQ's number a secret, or to possibly communicate to the audience that so many Reis have been produced that they gave up trying to number them.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Jul 01, 2013 6:36 am I found it interesting that, unlike Rei from 2.0, Rei Q doesn't even need to wear a collar to do... whatever it was she needed to do in the tank. (I don't think that's ever been explained in this universe either.)

[]:             Quote Post by Simitus » Mon Jul 01, 2013 8:16 am In any case, the secret of her cloned / serial production is clearly out by the time the events of 3.0 start. Everyone except Shinji and Rei Q understands she has been mass produced. I vaguely recall a clip from the preview at the end of 2.0 for Q where one adult Rei is standing protectively in front of a number of younger ones. I'm guessing this is part of the reason Gendo is considered a public enemy now.

[]: Re: Further analysis on Quantum magic/interim Reis             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Mon Jul 01, 2013 9:09 am Kendrix wrote: It seems like a chilling thought, that the source of all life could run dry like this; No more LCL, she bled out and the skulls beneath were revealed, the oceans where life once arose are all poisoned... It really is a dying world; Or perhaps, can humanity survive without it's gods/parents and "grow up"? Yeah. Final will tell.

[]: Re: Further analysis on Quantum magic/interim Reis             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Mon Jul 01, 2013 10:00 am kuribo-04 wrote: And does AU uniform mean "Alternate Universe uniform"? Because it is the uniform from ep. 26, right?

[]:             Quote Post by TruthfulLie » Mon Jul 01, 2013 10:01 am Personally I speculate that no Rei has physically merged with Lilith yet. I believe that Rei-02's merging with Unit-01 triggered Lilith's awakening (and whatever happened that we didn't see that chopped off its now Rei-like head) since there is deliberate shot that emphasizes Lilith as N3I/3I is happening. (Note that there are no other indication as to other Rei contacting Lilith at this point.) There could be two possibilities to explain why merging of Rei-02 and Unit-01 triggered Lilith's awakening. And I think it all depends on what Unit-01 actually is. Let's assume that Unit-01 is made of Lilith's body like NGE. Rei-02's introduction to Unit-01's core triggering awakening of its other half, Lilith seems very natural. If it is based or is one of the Adams, Lilith's soul could be calling upon its rightful vessel, Lilith to complete the merge on physical level. The reason why I speculate this is because of unlikeliness I find about Fuyutsuki's statement being a lie and the fact he also stated that putting her in Unit-01 was quite "dangerous" and not desirable (at least not at the time.) It seems to suggest that such would trigger something big, which I suspect has to do with Lilith's awakening of sort.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Jul 01, 2013 10:35 am About the Quantum Rei we saw in 3.0, a possibility is that if Rei II's soul is Lilith and EVA-01 is made from Lilith like in NGE, then when Rei's soul mixed with Zeruel's remains was absorbed by EVA-01, we got Lilith resurrected(Rei's soul inside her body) and the forbidden union of ADAM and Lilith lifeforms(Zeruel's remains), meaning that the giant of light we saw at the end of 2.0 was the same thing that GNR in EoE, but more glowy. And since in 3.0 she has been rescued form her orbital prison, Rei-Lilith can Quantum her way here and there again, like in EoE. That would tie with the theory that 3.0 is narratively a "personal" EoE for Shinji : he reaches a profound state of despair and kick off the end of the world because of his flaws, before realizing that what he had just done was wrong, the big difference being that in Rebuild triggering the apocalypse wasn't his objective and tat said end of the world was ultimately prevented by Mari, Asuka and Kaworu.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Mon Jul 01, 2013 10:43 am ElMariachi wrote: About the Quantum Rei we saw in 3.0, a possibility is that if Rei II's soul is Lilith and EVA-01 is made from Lilith like in NGE, then when Rei's soul mixed with Zeruel's remains was absorbed by EVA-01, we got Lilith resurrected(Rei's soul inside her body) and the forbidden union of ADAM and Lilith lifeforms(Zeruel's remains), meaning that the giant of light we saw at the end of 2.0 was the same thing that GNR in EoE, but more glowy.

[]:             Quote Post by TruthfulLie » Mon Jul 01, 2013 10:44 am ElMariachi wrote: About the Quantum Rei we saw in 3.0, a possibility is that if Rei II's soul is Lilith and EVA-01 is made from Lilith like in NGE, then when Rei's soul mixed with Zeruel's remains was absorbed by EVA-01, we got Lilith resurrected(Rei's soul inside her body) and the forbidden union of ADAM and Lilith lifeforms(Zeruel's remains), meaning that the giant of light we saw at the end of 2.0 was the same thing that GNR in EoE, but more glowy.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Jul 01, 2013 10:54 am SEELE didn't wanted EVA-01 awakening because it was under Gendo's control, and by the time of the end of 2.0 they discovered that Gendo had his own agenda(2.0 is one big cold war between Gendo and SEELE where they are sabotaging the crap out of each other) SEELE's plan was to awake Mark.06(which is under their direct control) and use it as the key to HIP. Killing all the Angels and resurrecting Lilith was also part of this plan. The resurrection probably included to put back her soul(Rei?) inside her body, but by trapping her soul inside an awakened EVA-01(made from Lilith?), resurrecting Lilith became impossible for SEELE since her soul already joined part of her body, and that said part of the body evolved thanks to the absorption of Zeruel. And the official French subtitles of 3.0 made it extremely clear that trapping Rei inside EVA-01 was completely part of Gendo's plan!

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Mon Jul 01, 2013 11:10 am Hmm, so GNR definitely wasn't Rei II's soul reuniting with Lilith....

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Jul 01, 2013 11:24 am Wait, who are you designing by "GNR"?

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Mon Jul 01, 2013 11:37 am I meant Lilith's corpse and the GNR head.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Jul 01, 2013 12:11 pm Oh, OK I see. About that, it's possible that the reunion of Rei with part of her body triggered a reaction in the rest of her body, the part still crucified in Central Dogma. Maybe that was a reaction that Gendo didn't planned but SEELE knew could happen thanks to the SDSS, explaining why Gendo's plan that was supposed to come to fruition "very soon" at the end of 2.0... still wasn't completed 14 years later.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Jul 01, 2013 10:54 am SEELE didn't wanted EVA-01 awakening because it was under Gendo's control, and by the time of the end of 2.0 they discovered that Gendo had his own agenda(2.0 is one big cold war between Gendo and SEELE where they are sabotaging the crap out of each other) SEELE's plan was to awake Mark.06(which is under their direct control) and use it as the key to HIP. Killing all the Angels and resurrecting Lilith was also part of this plan. The resurrection probably included to put back her soul(Rei?) inside her body, but by trapping her soul inside an awakened EVA-01(made from Lilith?), resurrecting Lilith became impossible for SEELE since her soul already joined part of her body, and that said part of the body evolved thanks to the absorption of Zeruel. And the official French subtitles of 3.0 made it extremely clear that trapping Rei inside EVA-01 was completely part of Gendo's plan!
